title: Add a product to the cart from details
description: This verifies that a shopper can add an item from the product details page and see it in the cart.

steps.description: Click a product in the list
Add the product to the cart
Verify the added item is displayed in the cart

title: Complete checkout from cart as a signed-in shopper
description: A signed-in shopper can move from the cart to checkout, review the order, and complete payment successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the purchase confirmation is visible

title: Open a product from the catalog
description: This verifies that a shopper can open a product details page from the catalog and review item information before buying.

steps.description: Click a product in the list
Verify the product details page is displayed

title: Continue checkout after signing in from a guest checkout page
description: A guest arriving on checkout can sign in, return to checkout, and complete the purchase without losing the checkout flow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the purchase confirmation is visible

title: Keep cart items while moving between pages
description: This verifies that a shopper's cart contents remain consistent after navigating away from the cart and back again.

steps.description: Click a product in the list
Add the product to the cart
Continue browsing to the product listing page
Verify the previously added item is still displayed in the cart
Verify the cart contents are unchanged

title: Search products from the product listing
description: This verifies that a shopper can search the catalog on the product listing page and see filtered results.

steps.description: Fill in the search field with a product name keyword
Verify the product list still shows search results

title: Review order details during checkout before payment
description: A signed-in shopper can reach checkout from the cart and review the order details before completing payment.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the order summary is visible

title: Remove an item from the cart
description: This verifies that a shopper can remove an item from the cart and see the cart return to an empty or reduced state.

steps.description: Click a product in the list
Add the product to the cart
Remove the item from the cart
Verify the item is no longer displayed in the cart
Verify the cart empty or reduced state is displayed

title: Filter products by category
description: This verifies that a shopper can narrow the product catalog by category and see matching items.

steps.description: Verify products matching the selected category are displayed
Verify the filtered catalog remains visible

title: Persist cart contents while moving into checkout
description: Items already in the cart remain available when the shopper proceeds into checkout.

steps.description: Add the item to the cart
Verify the added item is present in the order summary

title: Update item quantity in the cart
description: This verifies that a shopper can change an item's quantity in the cart and see the updated cart contents.

steps.description: Click a product in the list
Add the product to the cart
Change the item quantity to a different valid value
Verify the updated quantity is reflected in the cart
Verify the cart totals or item summary are updated

title: Browse products from the home page
description: This verifies that a guest shopper can discover products from the home page and reach the product listing page.

steps.description: Click the link to browse products
Verify the product listing page is displayed

title: Complete payment from checkout after reviewing cart changes
description: A signed-in shopper can update cart contents, proceed to checkout, and complete payment with the updated order.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the purchase confirmation is visible

title: Open a featured product from the home page
description: This verifies that a shopper can reach a product details page from featured products on the home page.

steps.description: Verify the product details page is displayed

title: Return to checkout after signing in from the checkout page
description: A shopper who starts checkout while signed out can sign in and return to the same checkout flow to finish payment.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the purchase confirmation is visible

title: Show checkout access restriction for a guest shopper
description: A guest visiting checkout sees the sign-in requirement and can start the authentication step to continue the purchase flow.

steps.description: Verify a sign-in requirement message is visible
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the checkout page is displayed
